title: Enventor Oscillating Multi Tools, 300W 15000-22000 OPM Electric Corded Multi Tool, 6 Variable Speeds, 3°Oscillation Angle, Quick-fit Blade Design, with 28pcs Accessories for Cutting, Sanding, Scraping
features: ➤【Powerful Motor】Featured with a 300W powerful motor, the corded electric oscillating multi tool provides a fast oscillation speed of 15000-22000OPM for sawing, cutting, sanding, scraping, dressing and grinding various materials with ease. (wood, pipes, tiles, nails, bolts , gypsum board, etc.)

➤【6 Variable Speeds and 3° Swing Angle】ENVENTOR oscillating tool offers 6 variable speeds between 15000-22000OPM, providing excellent efficiency and control for different cutting and grinding tasks. Use high speed for sawing, sanding and polishing stone, and low speed for cutting metal and polishing smooth surfaces. 3⁰ swing angle design makes work more efficient.

➤【Quick Change Blade Design】Quick-release locks allow quick replacement of blades and other accessories in seconds without tools, greatly improving efficiency and saving your time. (Multi-tool fits standard saw blades. When using universal interface or half-open blades, you can use the included spacers for installation.)

➤【Wide Application】Oscillating multi-tool set is perfect for a variety of sawing, cutting, sanding, scraping, cleaning, polishing and more. Sawing: Plunge cuts should only be applied to soft materials such as wood, plasterboard, etc. Cutting: Make precise cuts in tight areas with the flush-cut saw blade. Sanding: Use sandpaper for a range of detail sanding and smoothing. Scraping: The scraper blade is i deal for removing vinyl, varnish, paint coats, carpet, caulk, and other adhesives.

➤【Package Contents】1* Oscillating Multi Tool, 4* Closed Wood /Plastic Saw Blades(high carbon steel/10mm, 20mm, 31mm, 34mm tooth width), 2* Closed Semi-circular Wood/Plastic Saw Blades(high carbon steel/ 88mm), 1* Closed Scraper, 1* Triangular Sanding Pad(90x90x90mm), 20* Sandpaper, 1* User Manual.
description: Product Description Our brand “ENVENTOR” was inspired by the idea of Life Inventor. Every creation comes from life, and serve for life. Enventor is a new brand, it integrates both aesthetics and convenience into household life. It is created especially for providing household solutions- tools, accessories, and electronics. Our brand aims to make every Enventor product to meet the standard of aesthetics and practical, brings distinctive feeling to our customer in everytime use. ENVENTOR 300W 15000-22000 OPM Electric Corded Oscillating Multi Tools ●Wattage: 300W ●No-load Speed: ‎15000-22000 OPM ●Voltage & Frequency: 230-240V/50Hz ●Oscilations Angle: 3° ●6 Speeds Setting ●Quick Change Blade Design What will you get? 1* 300W Oscillating Multi Tool 4* Closed Wood /Wlastic Saw Blades 2* Closed Semi-circular Wood/Plastic Saw Blades 1* Closed Scraper 1* Triangular Sanding Pad (90x90x90mm) 20* Sandpaper (P60-5PCS, P80-5PCS, P100-5PCS, P120-5PCS) 6 Variable Speed The 6-speed settings of oscillating multi tool allows you to choose a more suitable speed according to different applications. 3° Oscilations Angle Delivers 3° of oscillation for great all-around performance and efficiency to handle any task. Quick Blade Change The quick-change system of this oscillating saw allows you to change blades and accessory without other tools. Universal Fit Interface The universal fit interface is compatible with most accessories from other brands. Multi-purpose Tool The oscillating multi tool is ideal for tackling a range of household repairs, sawing, cutting, sanding, scraping, trimming and grinding a variety of materials (wood, metal, plastic, ceramic, plasterboard and more) 28 Piece Accessories This oscillating tool kit includes cutting and sanding attachments to help with a variety of jobs. All of them are well stored in a carrying toolbag. 60PCS Multi Tool Blades 36PCS Multi Tool Blades 300W Oscillating Multi Tools 300W Oscillating Multi Tools 280W Oscillating Multi Tools 20V Brushless Reciprocating Saw Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 26 4.0 out of 5 stars 26 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,483 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,483 4.3 out of 5 stars 206 4.4 out of 5 stars 503 Price £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £26.99 £ 26 . 99 £46.74 £ 46 . 74 £46.74 £ 46 . 74 £51.99 £ 51 . 99 £69.99 £ 69 . 99 Brushless / / / / / ✓ Power / / 300W 300W 280W 20V RPM / / 15000-22000 OPM 15000-22000 OPM 15000-22000 OPM 12000-19500RPM Adjustable Angle / / 3° 3° 3° 4° Cordless / / / / / ✓ Package Content 60PCS* Wood /Plastic HCS Saw Blades(35mm) 5* HCS Saw Blades(45mm); 5* HCS Saw Blades(35mm); 5* HCS Precision Saw Blade(45mm); 5* HCS Precision Saw Blade(35mm); 5* BIM Saw Blades(45mm); 5* BIM Saw Blades(35mm); 2* HCS Saw Blades(65mm); 3* Semi-circular Saw Blades(88mm); 1* Scraper 1* 300W Oscillating Multi Tool; 4* Closed Wood /Plastic Saw Blades; 2* Closed Semi-circular Wood/Plastic Saw Blades; 1* Closed Scraper; 1* Triangular Sanding Pad; 20* Sandpaper; 1* User Manual 1* 300W Oscillating Multi Tool; 4* Closed Wood /Plastic Saw Blades; 2* Closed Semi-circular Wood/Plastic Saw Blades; 1* Closed Scraper; 1* Triangular Sanding Pad; 20* Sandpaper; 1* User Manual 1* 280W Oscillating Multi Tool; 43* Accessories; 1* User Manual 1* 20V Brushless Oscillating Multi Tool; 4* Open Wood/Plastic Saw Blades; 2* Open Semicircular Wood/Plastic Saw Blades; 1* Open Spatula; 1* Triangular Sand; 20* Sandpaper; 1* 2.0Ah Lithium-ion Battery & Charger; 1* Storage Case
